description: Update tests that currently flap/fail when run outside a tmux session so they first detect whether tmux is available/active for the environment and skip cleanly instead of failing. Validate with lint, test, and typecheck, then commit the fix.

comments.text:
Updated the tmux-sensitive beadwork orchestrator unit test to gate on `process.env.TMUX` and skip cleanly when not running inside a tmux session. Validation:
- `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension` ✅
- `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension` ✅ (`1 skipped` outside tmux)
- `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension` ✅
- `npm run lint` ✅ (existing Biome schema-version info notice only)
- `npm run test` ✅
- `npm run typecheck` ✅

title: Skip tmux-dependent tests gracefully when no tmux session is available
